attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who commits to long-distance moves (169km+) and finishes with sprint speed when in reduced groups. Capitalizes on tactical miscalculations by competitors.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish pattern. Solo breakaway effort observed without clear team setup support.
terrain_preference: Performs well in extended breakaway scenarios requiring endurance and finishing speed. Exact terrain preference unclear from single observation.
vulnerability: Three-year win drought (March 2019-June 2022) suggests inconsistency or difficulty converting opportunities. May struggle when not in breakaway scenarios.
key_patterns: Wins from small breakaway groups with sprint finish rather than solo efforts.
Benefits from peloton miscalculations allowing narrow margins (5-second gap held).
Capable of sustained 169km+ breakaway efforts with finishing speed intact.
form_trajectory: positive: First win in 3+ years suggests breakthrough or return to form, demonstrated race-winning fitness
